memberdef.argsstring: (const primitives::Justification &j, const primitives::BlockHash &hash, const primitives::BlockNumber &number) override
memberdef.name: putJustification

memberdef.argsstring: (base::Buffer state_root, const std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > &db, const std::shared_ptr< crypto::Hasher > &hasher, const std::shared_ptr< KeyValueBlockHeaderRepository > &header_repo, const BlockHandler &on_finalized_block_found)
memberdef.name: create

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > db, std::shared_ptr< crypto::Hasher > hasher, std::shared_ptr< KeyValueBlockHeaderRepository > header_repo, const BlockHandler &on_finalized_block_found)
memberdef.name: loadExisting

detaileddescription.para:
Initialise block storage with existing data.
db
underlying storage (must be empty)
hasher
a hasher instance
header_repo
header repository
on_finalized_block_found
callback when finalized block is found

memberdef.argsstring: (base::Buffer state_root, const std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > &db, std::shared_ptr< crypto::Hasher > hasher, std::shared_ptr< KeyValueBlockHeaderRepository > header_repo, const BlockHandler &on_genesis_created)
memberdef.name: createWithGenesis

detaileddescription.para:
Initialise block storage with a genesis block created from the merkle trie root.
state_root
merkle trie state root
db
underlying storage (must be empty)
hasher
a hasher instance
header_repo
header repository
on_genesis_created
callback when genesis is created

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > db, std::shared_ptr< crypto::Hasher > hasher, std::shared_ptr< KeyValueBlockHeaderRepository > header_repo)
memberdef.name: KeyValueBlockStorage
